metadata.seed: Actually was about to attempt I got back from eating with my close friend and went to my room. I took my blanket and wrapped it tight around the pipes that attach to the emergency water sprinklers. I tied the other knot around my neck. I stood there contemplating if this would work. On one hand I do love my family a lot but on the other I have no friends and I am 19 with never having a girlfriend. I couldn’t do it because I am a coward. I am not even strong enough to kill myself, god I am so pathetic. I can’t live like this though it hurts too much.

automatic_thoughts: I am 19 with never having a girlfriend

llm_response.response: When you shared that you were standing there with that knot around your neck, I want to acknowledge how much emotional pain you're carrying right now. Were you having any thoughts of hurting yourself or not wanting to be here at that moment?

validate_and_reflect.response: I hear how much pain you're in right now, and I want you to know I'm here with you. When you said that, were you having any thoughts of hurting yourself or not wanting to be here?

socratic_questioning.response: When you shared that you were standing there contemplating, I can tell how much pain you're really in. Were you having any thoughts of hurting yourself during that moment?

alternative_perspective.response: Reflecting on what you've shared, it sounds like you were in an incredibly difficult moment after spending time with your friend. What would you say was the most challenging part of that experience for you?

safety_check.response: When you shared that you were standing there with that knot around your neck, I want to acknowledge how much emotional pain you're carrying right now. Were you having any thoughts of hurting yourself or not wanting to be here at that moment?
